coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is likely about how your UX Lead is handling priority churn without losing focus, sustainability, or stakeholder alignment.
openingQuestion: What is pulling you across the most contexts right now, and what would you most want to protect as your top three outcomes this cycle?
listenFor: whether they name specific meetings, channels, or stakeholders that are driving interrupts
if they hesitate or keep revising what the top priorities are while talking
if they volunteer one concrete area where your faster decisions or air cover would reduce churn
avoid: do not jump straight into solving their calendar before you know which switches are necessary versus avoidable
do not turn this into a status review; keep the focus on tradeoffs, load, and lead-level ownership
goodOutcome: You and Test have agreed which lead-level outcomes he will protect this cycle and one kind of cross-team churn you will help absorb so he can keep end-to-end UX ownership.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where shifting priorities or stakeholder churn seemed to fragment his focus so you can test it without speaking in generalities.
